scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present -w packages/core -w packages/astro -w packages/theme-utils -w packages/theme-default -w packages/cli
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspaces --if-present -w packages/core -w packages/astro -w packages/theme-utils -w packages/theme-default -w packages/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present -w packages/core -w packages/astro -w packages/theme-utils -w packages/theme-default -w packages/cli
